title: Nigeria’s Digital PR Professionals Set to Converge at 10th Anniversary Summit - FinancialEDGE
description: The 10th Nigeria Digital PR Summit, themed as the biggest digital communication gathering in Africa, is scheduled to hold on October 15-16, 2025, at the Conference Centre, Naval Dockyard, Victoria Island, Lagos. This milestone edition promises to deliver insights, innovation, and inspiration, as digital communication professionals gather to share ideas, sharpen skills, and shape
html:
The 10th Nigeria Digital PR Summit, themed as the biggest digital communication gathering in Africa, is scheduled to hold on October 15-16, 2025, at the Conference Centre, Naval Dockyard, Victoria Island, Lagos.

 

This milestone edition promises to deliver insights, innovation, and inspiration, as digital communication professionals gather to share ideas, sharpen skills, and shape the future of digital storytelling.

 

The summit is supported by State House Digital Presidency and sponsored by top organizations, including Seplat Energy, Wema Bank, and Stanbic IBTC Bank. Union Bank, Lafarge, Eko Electric, Indigo Integrated Limited, Stephanie John Associates among other leading brands.

According to the convener of the Nigeria Digital PR Summit, Segun McMedal,  interested participants can register now at
www.ndprsummit.org/register.

“This milestone edition promises two unforgettable days of insights, innovation, and inspiration: celebratory, engaging, and transformative. We’re pulling out all the stops to ensure you leave with knowledge, networks, and memories that matter”.

 

The event is expected to set the benchmark for digital reputation management and professional excellence, providing attendees with knowledge, networks, and memories that matter.
